title: impatiens inconspicua var. inconspicua
intro: Impatiens inconspicua var. inconspicua, also known as Balsam Apple, is a plant species belonging to the balsam family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Impatiens inconspicua var. inconspicua include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
